← All tools

📍 Batch Geocoder

Paste addresses, cities or landmark names — one per line — and get coordinates for every entry, plotted on a map as they arrive and exportable as CSV or GeoJSON. Uses OpenStreetMap’s free Nominatim geocoder, politely: one lookup per second.

0 places to geocode Blank lines are skipped · duplicates are looked up once · one lookup per second, so 60 lines ≈ 1 minute

Results

StatusQueryMatched nameLatLngType
Nothing here yet — paste places above (or try the example), then press Run. Rows appear as each line resolves.
Map preview — click a ✓ row to zoom to its pin
Data © OpenStreetMap contributors, geocoding by Nominatim. Results stay in your browser.
Nominatim is a free community service — this tool paces requests to one per second and caps runs at 200 lines; please keep batches modest · a max tool
